events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: manufacturing floor, equipment bonding, observed isolated metal parts, work in progress. Reference NEC 250.104 (bonding of metal water piping, other metal piping systems, structural metal) and 250.30 (grounding separately derived systems). Isolated metal parts means metal parts not bonded to equipment grounding conductor, could become energized, shock hazard, arc/ignition. Severity high/critical? In manufacturing floor, isolated metal parts present shock/fire risk. Decision fail because non-compliant/unsafe. Need immediate controls: stop work, de-energize, bond isolated metal parts per NEC, verify continuity, inspect/test, restrict access, tag out. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. work_stage in-progress. percent_complete maybe 50? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. workable empty. findings list. actions list. references NEC 250.104, 250.30. Need ensure JSON valid.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Isolated metal parts are not bonded to the equipment grounding conductor.",
    "Ungrounded/bonded metal parts can become energized and present shock and electrocution risk.",
    "Potential for arcing, sparks, and fire in a manufacturing/assembly environment.",
    "Condition violates NEC bonding requirements for metal parts likely to become energized."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately in the affected area.",
    "De-energize circuits serving the isolated metal parts and verify absence of voltage.",
    "Bond all isolated metal parts to the equipment grounding conductor per NEC 250.104/250.30.",
    "Verify continuity and proper termination of bonding jumpers.",
    "Inspect and test bonding before re-energizing.",
    "Restrict access and tag out the area until bonding is corrected."
  ],
  "rationale": "Isolated metal parts on a production floor are a serious shock and fire hazard because they can become energized if a fault occurs. NEC requires bonding of metal parts likely to become energized; failure to do so is non-compliant and unsafe while work is in progress.",
  "references": ["NEC 250.104", "NEC 250.30"]
}
